---
title: "attendence_average"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(readr)
library(tidyverse)
combined_attendance <- read_csv("combined_attendance.csv")
```

```{r}
attendence_average <- combined_attendance |>
  group_by(COUNTY, school_year) |>
  summarize(av_rate = mean(`Attendance Rate`)) |>
  separate(school_year, into = "school_year", sep = "-",remove = TRUE)
  
write_csv(attendence_average, "attendence_average_final.csv")
```
